services.title: SaaS & MVP Development
services.description: I help startups and businesses turn ideas into scalable SaaS platforms and MVPs with fast development, modern architecture, and production-ready systems.
services.detailed_description: I specialise in building SaaS platforms and MVPs that are designed for real business growth, not just demos or prototypes. From idea validation to production launch, I create scalable, secure, and user-focused digital products that help businesses launch faster, validate ideas, attract customers, and scale confidently. Whether you are a startup founder building your first product or a business digitising internal operations, I deliver modern software solutions that are built to perform and grow with your business.

API development for mobile and third-party integrations

Scalable backend architecture and database design

services.title: Cloud & DevOps

Whether you are launching a SaaS platform, scaling an e-commerce store, or modernising legacy infrastructure, I ensure your systems are stable, secure, and built for long-term performance.

services.title: Database Design & Optimisation
services.description: Scalable database architecture, query optimisation, and performance tuning designed to keep your applications fast, reliable, and ready for long-term growth.
services.detailed_description: A well-structured database is the foundation of every scalable application. I design and optimise databases that handle growing traffic, large datasets, and complex business logic without slowing down your platform. From designing efficient relational schemas and indexing strategies to optimising slow queries and implementing caching systems, I ensure your application remains performant, maintainable, and cost-efficient as it scales. Whether you are building a new product or improving an existing system, I create database architectures engineered for reliability, speed, and long-term scalability.
services_included: API and ORM database performance optimisation
Backup, replication, and disaster recovery setup
benefits: Faster application performance through optimised queries and efficient data architecture
Scalable database systems capable of handling growing users and data volume

Better user experience through lower response times and faster dashboards
Long-term maintainability with clean and well-structured database architecture

services.title: API Development & Third-Party Integrations
services.description: Custom API development and seamless third-party integrations connecting your applications, payment systems, CRMs, marketing tools, and external services into one reliable ecosystem.
services.detailed_description: I design and build APIs and integration systems that allow your applications, platforms, and third-party services to communicate reliably at scale. Whether you need a backend API for a SaaS product, payment gateway integration, CRM synchronisation, webhook processing, or complex multi-system workflows, I create maintainable integration architecture built for long-term reliability. Every API and integration layer is designed with security, versioning, logging, monitoring, and scalability in mind so your business systems remain connected even as your platform evolves.

benefits: Centralised API architecture keeps systems connected reliably as your business grows

Versioned APIs allow your platform to evolve without breaking existing integrations

Flexible architecture makes switching providers or adding new integrations significantly easier
